name: Brocoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Package Good Seasons Italian Salad Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the broccoli florets, shredded cheddar cheese, drained kidney beans, diced cherry tomatoes, thinly sliced onions, and the contents of the Italian salad mix package.
2. Stir gently to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or preferably overnight, to allow flavors to meld together.
